calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, July 31, 2008: Brenda Cruz Keith, counsel for plaintiff Jane Lee, who is also present; Robert Beyers, Esquire, by limited scope representation for defendant William E. Furtado, who is also present.

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 2230 Mission Street #8, San Francisco, California 94110. The August 4, 2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Jason Jungreis, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
